tasks.title: Write explanation for BFS
tasks.description: Write a short paragraph explaining the Breadth-First Search algorithm, its type of traversal, and why it guarantees the shortest path in unweighted graphs in the 'bfs_explanation.txt' file.

tasks.title: Trace BFS algorithm on a given graph
tasks.description: Trace the BFS algorithm on the graph provided (A — B — C, A — D, B — E), documenting queue state and visited order at each step in the 'bfs_trace.txt' file.

tasks.title: Draw BFS tree
tasks.description: Draw and include the BFS tree based on the tracing done on the provided graph and explain it in the 'bfs_tree_diagram.png' file.

tasks.title: Write BFS pseudocode
tasks.description: Write the pseudocode for the BFS algorithm using a queue and a visited array in the 'bfs_pseudocode.txt' file.

tasks.title: Solve shortest path from S to E
tasks.description: Find the shortest path from S to E on the graph (S — A — B, S — C, C — D — E, B — E) and document the path in the 'bfs_shortest_path.txt' file.

tasks.title: Explain BFS short path step-by-step
tasks.description: Provide a step-by-step explanation of how the BFS algorithm finds the shortest path from S to E in the 'bfs_shortest_path_explanation.txt' file.

tasks.title: Explain BFS time complexity
tasks.description: Write an explanation of why the time complexity of BFS is O(V + E) in the 'bfs_complexity_analysis.txt' file.

tasks.title: Compare BFS and DFS
tasks.description: Document comparisons between BFS and DFS in terms of data structures, traversal styles, use cases, and memory usage in the 'bfs_vs_dfs.txt' file.

tasks.title: Write applications of BFS
tasks.description: List and explain applications of BFS in social networks and web crawling in the 'bfs_applications.txt' file.

tasks.title: Solve grid problem using BFS
tasks.description: Find the minimum steps from S to G for the grid problem and why BFS works here; document the solution and explanation in the 'bfs_grid_solution.txt' file.

tasks.title: Model grid as graph
tasks.description: Explain how to model the grid problem as a graph in the 'bfs_grid_graph_model.txt' file.

tasks.title: Implement BFS in Python or Java
tasks.description: Write the BFS algorithm in either Python or Java in the 'bfs_algorithm.py' or 'bfs_algorithm.java' file.

tasks.title: Explain Bidirectional BFS
tasks.description: Write an explanation of the Bidirectional BFS algorithm in the 'bfs_bidirectional_explanation.txt' file.

tasks.title: Final review, packaging, and submission
tasks.description: Review all files for correctness and completeness and prepare them for submission.
